qwenvl_scene_analysis: A young anime girl with long blue hair and cat ears sits at a poker table under vibrant pink and cyan lighting. She wears a black dress with gloves and a choker. At 0:00, she looks directly at the viewer with wide eyes; by 0:02, she holds up an Ace of Spades card with a playful smirk. The camera slowly zooms in on her face as she smiles confidently. Confetti and poker chips float around her. No scene transition occurs—this is a static shot with subtle zoom-in. The mood shifts from intense to playful, suggesting confidence and charm. Repeating motifs include floating cards and chips, emphasizing gambling themes. This moment suggests a high-energy, upbeat track with synth-heavy percussion and catchy hooks. Lyrics could focus on boldness, luck, or seduction. Music prompt: “Upbeat, cinematic pop-rock with neon synths and driving bass.”

prompt_summary.resolved_prompt: Upbeat cinematic pop-rock with neon synths and driving bass, starting with a punchy intro riff that builds momentum. Verse introduces melodic hooks with syncopated drums and shimmering arpeggios. Pre-chorus swells with layered harmonies and rising tension. Chorus explodes into a full-band anthem with aggressive guitar riffs, bright synth leads, and a pulsating bassline — punctuated by sharp, rhythmic snare hits. Mid-section drop features a stripped-down, almost whispered vocal line before re-entering with full force. Outro fades with echoing synth pads and fading percussion, leaving a lingering sense of triumph. Hook moments emphasize the Ace of Spades motif — sudden staccato bursts synced to card flips — reinforcing theme and energy.

lyrics_summary.resolved_lyrics:
[Verse]
Neon lights flash, I’m the queen of the game  
Cards fly wild, my smile’s got no shame  
Poker chips spin, I’m the one who wins  
In this casino, I’m never undone  

[Pre-Chorus]  
I don’t need luck—I’ve got the edge  
My eyes gleam bright, I’m the ace of the deck  
The tables shake, the crowd goes wild  
I’m the storm that breaks every rule  

[Chorus]  
Neon run, I’m the flame in the dark  
Ace in hand, I’ll take it all back  
From the floor to the top, I’m the queen  
No one dares challenge me, I’m the neon run!  

[Verse]  
Confetti rains down, I’m dancing alone  
With my spade in hand, I’m fearless, I’m known  
The dice roll loud, but I’m not afraid  
I’m the heart of the night, I’m the neon parade  

[Pre-Chorus]  
I don’t need luck—I’ve got the edge  
My eyes gleam bright, I’m the ace of the deck  
The tables shake, the crowd goes wild  
I’m the storm that breaks every rule  

[Chorus]  
Neon run, I’m the flame in the dark  
Ace in hand, I’ll take it all back  
From the floor to the top, I’m the queen  
No one dares challenge me, I’m the neon run!  

[Bridge]  
They say I’m lucky, they say I’m bold  
But I know what I am—I’m the neon gold  
I ride the beat, I break the chain  
This ain’t just a game—it’s my reign!  

[Final Chorus]  
Neon run, I’m the flame in the dark  
Ace in hand, I’ll take it all back  
From the floor to the top, I’m the queen  
No one dares challenge me, I’m the neon run!  

[Outro]  
And when the lights dim, I still shine  
The ace is mine, the crown is mine  
Neon run… forever I’ll be the queen  
Of this wild, electric dream.
